text: New addition - proposal received from AEW UK REIT plc, all share proposal would be based on respective net asset values. No price given.
Picton confirms consortium comprised of LondonMetric Property PLC and Schroder Real Estate Investment Trust Ltd is one of the interested parties.
Long Stop Date extended from 29 March to 29 May 2026 as FCA approval still not granted.
Discussions with Bridgepoint and Triton have ended. Spire in discussions with other parties.
All regulatory approvals received. Scheme expected to become effective on 1 April 2026.
